rationale: US-004 is fully implemented and integrated. The plan accurately describes the existing code: src/input/signals.ts (55 lines) implements all five acceptance criteria with null fallbacks for unavailable APIs. Tests cover all signal paths and fallback branches (11 tests in US-004 block, correcting the plan's claim of 12). No storage APIs are used. The BrowserSignals type is already consumed by three downstream modules (sessionSeed.ts, mappings.ts, main.ts). Since the plan is verification-only with no new code changes, there is zero architectural impact.

plan_accuracy.test_count_note: Plan claims 12 US-004 tests; actual count is 11. Plan's reviewer_corrections field already flags this.
